rule Windows_VulnDriver_AsIo_5f9f29be
{
	meta:

		fingerprint = "82967badefb37a3964de583cb65f423afe46abc299d361c7a9cd407b146fd897"

		last_modified = "2022-04-04"

		severity = 50

	strings:

	condition:

}
